title: Stray
description: This texture pack adds mobs from the universe of the game Stray
body:
## StrayTexturePack
**This texture pack brings elements of _Stray_ into your game! Now, the main character, the Cat, and its enemies, the Zurks, will appear in your game world. Every in-game cat will transform into the Cat from _Stray_, and Endermites will take on the appearance of Zurks. Future updates will also add other items from the _Stray_ universe.**
